---
title: "Macroeconomics II - Group J"
author: "Group J"
date: "2026-02-13"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r Maximum Likelihood Estimate}
library(dplyr)
data = read.csv("group_assignment_q2_data.csv")

N = nrow(data)
sum_u = sum(data["Weeks.unemployed"])

u_bar = sum_u / N

w_star = (3 / 2) - (1 / u_bar)
print(w_star)
```
